title: port_hueneme_2025 (window 0)
text:
CITY OF PORT HUENEME 
NOTICE OF ADOPTED ORDINANCE 
 
NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN that on November 17, 2025 the City Council of the City of Port Hueneme adopted 
the following Ordinance: 
 
AN ORDINANCE OF THE CITY COUNCIL OF THE CITY OF PORT HUENEME, CALIFORNIA, AMENDING 
ARTICLE VIII, BUILDING REGULATIONS, OF THE PORT HUENEME MUNICIPAL CODE INCORPORATING 
THE CALIFORNIA BUILDING STANDARDS CODE BY REFERENCE AS FOLLOWS:  (1) CALIFORNIA 
BUILDING CODE (CBC) WITH APPENDICES C, G, I AND J, CALIFORNIA RESIDENTIAL BUILDING CODE 
(CRC) WITH APPENDIX BF, AND CALIFORNIA GREEN BUILDING STANDARDS CODE (CGBSC), 2025 
EDITIONS; (2) CALIFORNIA ELECTRICAL CODE (CEC), 2025 EDITION; (3) CALIFORNIA PLUMBING CODE 
(CPC), 2025 EDITION; (4) CALIFORNIA MECHANICAL CODE (CMC), 2025 EDITION; (5) CALIFORNIA 
ADMINISTRATIVE CODE (CAC), 2025 EDITION; (6) CALIFORNIA ENERGY CODE CENC), 2025 EDITION; 
(7) CALIFORNIA EXISTING BUILDING CODE (CEBC), 2025 EDITION; (8) CALIFORNIA WILDLAND-URBAN 
INTERFACE, 2025 EDITION; (9) INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY MAINTENANCE CODE (IPMC), 2024 
EDITION; (10) INTERNATIONAL SWIMMING POOL AND SPA CODE (ISPSC), 2024 EDITION; (11) GYPSUM 
ASSOCIATION FIRE RESISTIVE DESIGN MANUAL, TWENTY-THIRD EDITION, GA-600-2024; AND MAKING 
MISCELLANEOUS REVISIONS TO ARTICLE VIII, BUILDING REGULATIONS, TO PROVIDE CONSISTENCY 
WITH THE CALIFORNIA BUILDING STANDARDS CODE 
 
Summary: October 20, 2025, a public hearing was held by the City Council to introduce the above Ordinance. 
The proposed Ordinance will adopt by reference the current editions of certain uniform codes together with 
amendments as outlined above.  
 
Ordinance No. 828 was adopted by the following vote: AYES: Gama, Hernandez, Perez, Lopez, McQueen-
Legohn; NOES: None; ABSTAIN: None; ABSENT: None. 
 
The full text of the ordinance as well as the referenced codes are available for review during normal business 
hours at the City Clerk’s Office at the address noted above. 
 
/s/Georgianna Nicole Alvarez, City Clerk
